troubleshooting.title: Unexpected File Mutations
troubleshooting.shortdesc: Investigate unexpected output structure by validating plan targets and handler routing.

troublebody.p: Problem: Applied output contains files in unexpected locations or with unexpected naming.
Cause: Target path calculation in planning or plugin action emission is incorrect, or a custom handler writes beyond intended logical structure while still inside sandbox bounds.

ul.li: Inspect plan targets: jq '.actions[] | {id, type, target, parameters}' build/plan.json.
Inspect execution metadata for source and target pairs where available.
Confirm that plugin emit_actions(...) uses deterministic target path rules.
Run dry-run and review projected actions before apply mode.
Add or update tests that assert exact target paths for representative fixtures.
